display_text: Slippers of Agility, Cost: 140: Basic agility-boosting component item. Provides +3 Agility, offering a small amount of damage and attack speed for agility heroes and contributing to overall Agility-based scaling. Often purchased as a starting item or to build into higher-tier Agility items. Stats: Agility: +3.

display_text: Slippers of Agility, Cost: 140: Core starting component for heroes prioritizing early last hits and trading. Synergizes with other Agility components to build into powerful early-to-mid game items like Wraith Band or Power Treads (Agility).
